summary: Packet 12 is supposed to stay UI-only, but the packet-11/11A/11B backend still lacks the remaining Setup View contract: session-scoped runtime configuration transport and setup-view-ready intake metadata, so another backend repair packet is required before the SPA can land cleanly.
notes: Trackers were updated to insert repair packet 11C immediately after packet 11B, to make packet 12 depend on that repair, and to correct stale packet-status prose/horizon state.
